headline: Wabtec Corp (NYSE:WAB) Stands Out in Quality-Focused Caviar Cruise Screen
summary: Quality investing focuses on durable companies like Wabtec Corp (WAB), which shows strong 18.6% EBIT growth, 143% cash conversion, and a 74.7% ROIC, making it a screen standout for long-term portfolios.
